attributes.name: OPC40077
attributes.description: Collects the data type descriptions of http://opcfoundation.org/UA/PlasticsRubber/IMM2MES/

attributes.name: NamespaceUri
attributes.description: A URI that uniquely identifies the dictionary.

attributes.name: OPC40077
attributes.description: Collects the data type descriptions of http://opcfoundation.org/UA/PlasticsRubber/IMM2MES/

attributes.name: NamespaceUri
attributes.description: A URI that uniquely identifies the dictionary.

attributes.name: ContinueAtJobEnd
attributes.description: Indication if the machine continues the production even if the nominal output has been reached

attributes.name: CustomerName
attributes.description: Name of the cumstomer for that the job is produced

attributes.name: ExpectedCycleTime
attributes.description: Calculated cycle time for the job

attributes.name: JobDescription
attributes.description: Description of the job

attributes.name: JobName
attributes.description: Name of the job

attributes.name: Material
attributes.description: Array of material names used for the job

attributes.name: MouldId
attributes.description: Id of the Mould used for the job

attributes.name: NominalBoxParts
attributes.description: Number of parts that shall be put into one box

attributes.name: NominalParts
attributes.description: Total number (sum of all cavities) of parts that shall be produced by the job

attributes.name: NumCavities
attributes.description: Number of cavities in the Mould used for production

attributes.name: ProductDescription
attributes.description: Array of descriptions of the products produced by the job

attributes.name: ProductionDatasetDescription
attributes.description: Additional description of the production dataset which is needed for the job

attributes.name: ProductionDatasetName
attributes.description: Name of the production dataset which is needed for the job

attributes.name: ProductName
attributes.description: Array of product names produced by the job

attributes.name: AverageCycleTime
attributes.description: Average cycle time

attributes.name: BoxBadPartsCounter
attributes.description: Number of bad parts produced in the current box

attributes.name: BoxCycleCounter
attributes.description: Number of finished cycles for the current box

attributes.name: BoxGoodPartsCounter
attributes.description: Number of good parts produced in the current box

attributes.name: BoxId
attributes.description: Id of the box in which the current production is put in

attributes.name: BoxPartsCounter
attributes.description: Total number of parts produced in the current box

attributes.name: BoxTestSamplesCounter
attributes.description: Number of test sample parts produced in the current box

attributes.name: CurrentLotName
attributes.description: Name of the current production lot

attributes.name: JobBadPartsCounter
attributes.description: Number of bad parts produced in the current job

attributes.name: JobCycleCounter
attributes.description: Number of finished cycles in the job

attributes.name: JobGoodPartsCounter
attributes.description: Number of good parts produced in the current job

attributes.name: JobPartsCounter
attributes.description: Total number of parts produced in the current job

attributes.name: JobStatus
attributes.description: Current status of the job

attributes.name: JobTestSamplesCounter
attributes.description: Number of test sample parts produced in the current job

attributes.name: LastCycleTime
attributes.description: Time of the recently finished cycle

attributes.name: LastPartId
attributes.description: Id(s) of the parts produced in the recently finished cycle

attributes.name: MachineCycleCounter
attributes.description: Number of finished cycles in the machine life time

attributes.name: ContinueAtJobEnd
attributes.description: Indication if the machine continues the production even if the nominal output has been reached

attributes.name: CustomerName
attributes.description: Name of the cumstomer for that the job is produced

attributes.name: ExpectedCycleTime
attributes.description: Calculated cycle time for the job

attributes.name: JobDescription
attributes.description: Description of the job

attributes.name: JobName
attributes.description: Name of the job

attributes.name: Material
attributes.description: Array of material names used for the job

attributes.name: MouldId
attributes.description: Id of the Mould used for the job

attributes.name: NominalBoxParts
attributes.description: Number of parts that shall be put into one box

attributes.name: NominalParts
attributes.description: Total number (sum of all cavities) of parts that shall be produced by the job

attributes.name: NumCavities
attributes.description: Number of cavities in the Mould used for production

attributes.name: ProductDescription
attributes.description: Array of descriptions of the products produced by the job

attributes.name: ProductionDatasetDescription
attributes.description: Additional description of the production dataset which is needed for the job

attributes.name: ProductionDatasetName
attributes.description: Name of the production dataset which is needed for the job

attributes.name: ProductName
attributes.description: Array of product names produced by the job

attributes.name: LocationName
attributes.description: Description of the location of the machine given by the machine operator or OPC client

attributes.name: PageDirectory
attributes.description: List of the pages that are implemented in the machine control system and are shown on the screen of the machine

attributes.name: TimeZoneOffset
attributes.description: Difference of the local time to Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) given by the machine operator or OPC client

attributes.name: UserMachineName
attributes.description: Description of the machine given by the machine operator or OPC client

attributes.name: ControllerName
attributes.description: Name of the machine controller

attributes.name: DeviceClass
attributes.description: Indicates in which domain or for what purpose a device is used.

attributes.name: Manufacturer
attributes.description: Name of the company that manufactured the device

attributes.name: Model
attributes.description: Model name of the device

attributes.name: SerialNumber
attributes.description: Identifier that uniquely identifies, within a manufacturer, a device instance

attributes.name: SupportedLogbookEvents
attributes.description: Information which LogbookEvents are supported by the machine

attributes.name: MESUrl
attributes.description: URL to display a webpage generated by the MES in a web browser integrated in the machine

attributes.name: StandstillReasons
attributes.description: List of the standstill reasons from which one is selected by the operator in the case of a standstill

attributes.name: StandstillReasonsLockedByMES
attributes.description: Indication if the list StandstillReasons has been modified by the MES and may not be changed by the machine

attributes.name: Id
attributes.description: Id of the message

attributes.name: Message
attributes.description: Text of the message

attributes.name: Severity
attributes.description: Severity of the message

attributes.name: AutomaticRunEnabled
attributes.description: Indication if semi-automatic and automatic run of the machine is allowed by MES

attributes.name: ProductionOnlyWithMES
attributes.description: Indication if production with the machine is only allowed when the MES is active

attributes.name: ProductionReleasedByMES
attributes.description: Indication if ProductionStatus may have the value PRODUCTION_4

attributes.name: ProductionStatus
attributes.description: Production status when the machine is in automatic or semi-automatic mode

attributes.name: Classification
attributes.description: Classification of the message

attributes.name: Id
attributes.description: Id of the message

attributes.name: Message
attributes.description: Text of the message

attributes.name: Severity
attributes.description: Severity of the message

attributes.name: StandstillReasonId
attributes.description: Id of the StandstillReason set by the operator after a standstill occurs

attributes.name: IsPresent
attributes.description: Indication if the machine is physically present and connected

attributes.name: MachineMode
attributes.description: Current machine mode (as defined by mode selector on the machine)

attributes.name: Frozen
attributes.description: Indication if changes on the machine in the production dataset are allowed

attributes.name: Information
attributes.description: Set of information on the production dataset

attributes.name: Modified
attributes.description: Indication if the production dataset has been changed after the last storage

attributes.name: Frozen
attributes.description: Indication if changes on the machine in the production dataset are allowed

attributes.name: Information
attributes.description: Set of information on the production dataset

attributes.name: Modified
attributes.description: Indication if the production dataset has been changed after the last storage

attributes.name: BackPressure
attributes.description: Back pressure is the melt-pressure against the screw movement during dosage

attributes.name: CavityPressureMaximum
attributes.description: Maximum pressure during the injection process in the cavity or mould

attributes.name: CushionStroke
attributes.description: Stroke position at cushion

attributes.name: CushionVolume
attributes.description: Material volume remained in front of the screw after injection and holding pressure

attributes.name: DecompressionVolumeAfterPlastification
attributes.description: Decompression after plastification is the movement of the screw in the opposite direction to injection

attributes.name: DecompressionVolumeBeforePlastification
attributes.description: Decompression before plastification is the movement of the screw in the opposite direction to injection

attributes.name: DosingTime
attributes.description: Time to melt-up the plastic granulates and feed the melt for the next injection shot to the front of the screw

attributes.name: FlowIndex
attributes.description: Flow index

attributes.name: HoldHydraulicPressureAverage
attributes.description: Average holding pressure in the hydraulic cylinder

attributes.name: HoldHydraulicPressureMaximum
attributes.description: Maximum holding pressure in the hydraulic cylinder

attributes.name: HoldSpecificPressureAverage
attributes.description: Average holding pressure in front of the screw

attributes.name: HoldSpecificPressureMaximum
attributes.description: Maximum holding pressure in front of the screw

attributes.name: HydraulicPressureMaximum
attributes.description: Maximum pressure in the hydraulic cylinder

attributes.name: Index
attributes.description: Index of the injection unit

attributes.name: InjectionSpeedAverage
attributes.description: Average injection speed (e.g. mm/s)

attributes.name: InjectionSpeedMaximum
attributes.description: Maximum injection speed (e.g. mm/s)

attributes.name: InjectionStartPosition
attributes.description: Start position of the injection

attributes.name: InjectionTime
attributes.description: Time required to fill the cavity or mould

attributes.name: PlastificationCircumferentialSpeedAverage
attributes.description: Average screw circumferential speed for plastification (e.g. mm/s)

attributes.name: PlastificationCircumferentialSpeedMaximum
attributes.description: Maximum screw circumferential speed for plastification (e.g. mm/s)

attributes.name: PlastificationHydraulicPressureAverage
attributes.description: Average plastification pressure in cylinder

attributes.name: PlastificationHydraulicPressureMaximum
attributes.description: Maximum plastification pressure in cylinder

attributes.name: PlastificationRotationalSpeedAverage
attributes.description: Average plastification speed of the injection unit (RPM)

attributes.name: PlastificationRotationalSpeedMaximum
attributes.description: Maximum plastification speed of the injection unit (RPM)

attributes.name: PlastificationSpecificPressureAverage
attributes.description: Average plastification pressure in front of the screw tip

attributes.name: PlastificationSpecificPressureMaximum
attributes.description: Maximum plastification pressure in front of the screw tip

attributes.name: PlastificationVolume
attributes.description: Volume dosed by the machine for the next injection shot

attributes.name: SpecificPressureMaximum
attributes.description: Pressure in front of the screw tip

attributes.name: TransferCavityPressure
attributes.description: Cavity pressure in the mould during switch-over to the holding pressure

attributes.name: TransferHydraulicPressure
attributes.description: Hydraulic pressure in the cylinder during switch-over to the holding pressure

attributes.name: TransferSpecificPressure
attributes.description: Pressure in front of the screw tip during switch-over to the holding pressure

attributes.name: TransferStroke
attributes.description: Switch-over point to the holding pressure via stroke

attributes.name: TransferVolume
attributes.description: Switch-over point to the holding pressure via volume

attributes.name: VPChangeOverPosition
attributes.description: Screw position at switching between injection (V) and holding pressure (P)

attributes.name: BarrelId
attributes.description: Id (e.g. serial number) of the barrel

attributes.name: Index
attributes.description: Number of the injection unit

attributes.name: InProduction
attributes.description: information if the injection unit is used in the current running production

attributes.name: IsPresent
attributes.description: Information if the injection unit is physically installed on the injection machines

attributes.name: MaxScrewStroke
attributes.description: maximum stroke of the screw installed in the injection unit

attributes.name: ScrewDiameter
attributes.description: diameter of the screw installed in the injection unit

attributes.name: ScrewId
attributes.description: Id of the screw installed in the injection unit

attributes.name: ScrewVolume
attributes.description: volume of the screw installed in the injection unit

attributes.name: BarrelId
attributes.description: Id (e.g. serial number) of the barrel

attributes.name: Index
attributes.description: Number of the injection unit

attributes.name: InProduction
attributes.description: information if the injection unit is used in the current running production

attributes.name: IsPresent
attributes.description: Information if the injection unit is physically installed on the injection machines

attributes.name: MaxScrewStroke
attributes.description: maximum stroke of the screw installed in the injection unit

attributes.name: ScrewDiameter
attributes.description: diameter of the screw installed in the injection unit

attributes.name: ScrewId
attributes.description: Id of the screw installed in the injection unit

attributes.name: ScrewVolume
attributes.description: volume of the screw installed in the injection unit
